title: Better Crafts Vanila
description: Improvement of old and addition of new crafts in the game. Balanced and visually similar crafts.
body:
Datapack will add the ability to create previously unavailable items, as well as replace the old unfinished krafts. All crafts can be viewed in the image section or in the achievements section of the game.

New crafts (and features):
- Smelting ore blocks in a furnace
- Smelting sand to glass in a blast furnace
- Invisible Item Frame
- Light Block
- Anvil repair
- Bee honeycomb

Swapped Crafts:
- All kinds of trapdoors (x6)
